## Testing

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` clean
- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` passes (if frontend changes)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds (if frontend changes)
